text: You have permission to prioritize your life, even when it feels like everything else is taking over. Start small, be consistent, and watch motivation follow.
decision_reason: Motivational tone aligns with the goal of follower growth, and the permission slip trigger encourages action.

text: What's the smallest habit you can build today to move closer to your goals? I'm trying to fix my sleep schedule, one 5:30 am wake-up at a time.
decision_reason: Casual tone and question format invite engagement, and the specificity shock trigger encourages tangible action.

text: 3 ways inconsistency holds you back: loses motivation, forgets goals, and gives up on dreams. The cost of not showing up is real. Don't let it happen to you.
decision_reason: Reflective tone and list format convey the importance of consistency, and the stakes escalation trigger emphasizes the cost of inaction.
